free_text: Measurement of the absolute values of (g,n)  reaction
effective cross  sections for Cu, Ce, La, Ta, Au, Pb,
annihilation in flight of fast positrons.
Mesure des sections  effecaces  (g,n)  de Cu, Ce, La,
Ta, Au, Pb et Bi en valeur absolue.
annihilation in flight of fast positrons  were  used
to obtain absolute total photoneutron cross sections
of copper,  lanthanum,  cerium, tantalum, gold, lead
and bithmuth in the Giant Resonance peak.
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
A natural copper target of thickness 11.02 g/cm**2.
A natural   lanthanum   target   of  thickness  12.46
A natural cerium target of thickness 10.87 g/cm**2.
A natural tantalum target of thickness 13.35 g/cm**2.
A natural gold target of thickness 10.48 g/cm**2.
A natural lead target of thickness 18.34 g/cm**2.
A natural bismuth target of thickness 15.71 g/cm**2.
